visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a medium shot of a woman with long dark hair, wearing a brown puffer jacket and a checkered skirt, standing in a Costco warehouse. She is holding a portable stainless steel heater and its box in front of a massive stack of pink 'Kairo' hand warmer boxes. A large 'Costco Wholesale' logo is overlaid at the top. She looks at the heater while adjusting its position for the camera. (2) The camera moves closer to the product as she points to the heater's front grill. She then turns the product slightly to show a side circular opening where a gas canister would be inserted. Her hands are active, demonstrating the size and features. The lighting is bright and industrial, typical of a warehouse store. (3) A cut shifts the focus to a stack of 'Kairo' hand warmer boxes, with a price tag of $349 visible in the background. A finger points towards the boxes, comparing the mass-market warming product to the expensive portable heater. (4) The woman is shown again in a medium shot, leaning against a shelf. She laughs and gestures with her hands as she speaks. In the background, various household electronics and kitchen appliances are visible on the shelves under the bright studio-like store lights. (5) The final phase shows her smiling and looking directly at the camera, leaning one arm on the stack of boxes. Her expression is lighthearted and dismissive, emphasizing her point about the product's practicality in the local climate.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 究竟誰會買這個 拜託留言告訴我. (2) [Slogan]: 露營神器 可攜式不鏽鋼暖爐. (3) [Subtitle]: 1,999元. [Subtitle]: 它這個不鏽鋼做的很漂亮哎. (4) [Subtitle]: 真的很韓風有沒有. (5) [Subtitle]: 然後這邊呢 是你插那種小罐便攜的那種卡式爐. (6) [Subtitle]: 那個瓦斯桶 啊不是瓦... (7) [Subtitle]: 瓦斯罐 OK. (8) [Subtitle]: 瓦斯桶再 咚進去. (9) [Subtitle]: 瓦斯罐這樣 咚進去. (10) [Subtitle]: 然後你這邊就可以 點火. (11) [Subtitle]: 其實很不方便 因為你還要再插一個... (12) [Subtitle]: 就是你看你這樣很漂亮 可是你旁邊插的是那種 臺灣的瓦斯罐. (13) [Subtitle]: 不是這個1,990 為什麼不買旁邊的這種 暖暖包. (14) [Subtitle]: 1999 沒有 我跟你講 這是專供哪個客群. [Variety]: 氛圍. (15) [Subtitle]: 哪一個 露營. [Variety]: 烤麵包. (16) [Subtitle]: 其實我覺得它比較像烤麵包機. (17) [Subtitle]: 到底誰要買這個啊. (18) [Subtitle]: 其實臺灣沒有那麼冷啦.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator is visible; an additional person is pointing off-camera but only their hand/voice is present.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long, straight dark hair, wearing a brown puffer jacket and a white and grey checkered pattern skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco warehouse interior with high ceilings and heavy-duty metal racking. Stacks of bulk consumer products are visible, specifically hand warmers and portable heater boxes.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks with a high, animated pitch, expressing curiosity. The background music is a bouncy, comedic electronic track with a steady drum beat. (2) A 'whoosh' sound effect plays as she highlights the product features. Her speech rate is fast and energetic as she describes the 'Korean style' of the heater. (3) A 'ding' sound effect coincides with her mentioning the price. (4) A deeper male voice enters the conversation, sounding equally playful. He adds humorous commentary. (5) A 'clink' sound effect emphasizes the demonstration of the gas canister slot. The female creator laughs while correcting herself. (6) The male voice asks a rhetorical question about buying hand warmers instead, his tone is teasing. (7) A cartoonish 'boing' or comedic SFX plays as they joke about it looking like a toaster. The audio finishes with a final high-pitched humorous remark from the woman over the continuous upbeat BGM.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a lighthearted shopping vlog where the creator discovers a niche portable heater at Costco. She uses humor and a casual conversational style to question the product's practicality for the general public, comparing it to standard hand warmers and joking about its appearance as a toaster, ultimately aiming to engage her audience through a relatable shopping scenario.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video appears to be an organic shopping vlog/critique rather than a paid promotion, as it questions the value of the product.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical 'variety show' editing styles common in Taiwanese social media, featuring heavy use of colored subtitles and comedic sound effects to maintain high engagement.
